_meta.description: Honest baseline sweep — all models on the SAME 600 held-out examples (300 val sequences x {0.6,0.8} cut points), ORIGINAL-name ground truth = official scorer convention.

task3_anomaly_selftest.caveat: F1=1.0 measured on self-injected anomalies using the same 10 rules the validator checks (somewhat circular). LSTM NLL is the backstop for novel rule types.

legacy_note: An older pre-canonical LSTM+GPT+Markov soft-vote ensemble scored 71.5% Top-1 / 100% Top-5 on a DIFFERENT (pre-canonical) self-eval set — NOT directly comparable to this sweep. Use the 70.0% number from this sweep for apples-to-apples slides.
